ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "exchange_type" TEXT /* Type of exchange (e.g., direct, topic, fanout) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the exchange is active */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the transport_protocols table to specify the transport protocol used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchanges_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES transport_protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queues" (
  "queue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each queue */,
  "queue_name" TEXT /* Name of the queue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the queue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the queue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the queue was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the queue is active */,
  "max_message_size" INTEGER /* Maximum size of messages that the queue can handle */,
  "message_ttl" INTEGER /* Time-to-live for messages in the queue */,
  "dead_letter_exchange_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the exchanges table to specify the dead-letter exchange for the queue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("queue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queues_dead_letter_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("dead_letter_exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bindings" (
  "binding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each binding */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "queue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the queue */,
  "routing_key" TEXT /* Routing key for the binding */,
  "arguments" TEXT /* Arguments for the binding */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the binding was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the binding was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the binding is active */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the binding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("binding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bindings_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bindings_queue_id FOREIGN KEY ("queue_id") REFERENCES queues ("queue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "queue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the queue */,
  "payload" TEXT /* Payload of the message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Delivery status of the message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the message is active */,
  "message_format_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the message_formats table to specify the format of the message */,
  "correlation_id" TEXT /* Correlation ID for tracking related messages */,
  "reply_to" TEXT /* Queue name to which replies should be sent */,
  "expiration" TEXT /* Expiration time for the message */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the message */,
  "redelivered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the message has been redelivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_message_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_format_id") REFERENCES message_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_queue_id FOREIGN KEY ("queue_id") REFERENCES queues ("queue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metadata is active */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of the metadata (e.g., system, user-defined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_metadata_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transport_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol (e.g., AMQP, MQTT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protocol was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protocol was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the protocol is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., JSON, XML) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the format was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the format was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the format is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error event */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date when the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message describing the error */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., connection error, message error) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error log was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the error log is active */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table to specify the user associated with the error */,
  "queue_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the queues table to specify the queue associated with the error */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the exchanges table to specify the exchange associated with the error */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the messages table to specify the message associated with the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_queue_id FOREIGN KEY ("queue_id") REFERENCES queues ("queue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key for the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value for the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
